dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: Hey Echo! Long time no see. Just paying my usual visit to Derry. Everything's still vivid in my head, how that night went...do you have some time right now?

choices.text: I mean, might be awkward, but why not?
I need to go walk my hamster...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: Thanks, I've been really needing to vent.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: Uhm, okay...I'll make it quick then.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: As you know, Derry and I lived together. One day, I brought home a new TV only to find it broken on the floor the next day, with my car missing as well. I was furious. I waited all day for him to come back, so I could kick his ass...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: ...Later on, Derry came back and I got on his case...it got nasty, almost physical, then I drove away. While I was driving, I noticed a receipt for a TV from earlier that day. I checked the trunk and realized Derry went and got a new TV.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: I felt awful for being such an asshole when he was trying to make up for his accident. I worked up the courage to apologize on the drive home, and when I got back...

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: The house was up in flames. The fire fighters did everything they could, and when I asked about Derry...I still remember the look on the paramedic's face.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: I really appreciate you listening. It means more than you think.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: Sorry, my emotional baggage is the last thing you'd care about.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: Sh*%, I completely forgot to clean up the leaves like I told Stevey I would. I'm a mess.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: I'm sorry to ask this of you Echo, but is there any chance you'll clean up the leaves? I'm sure Stevey will have something cool for you as a reward.

choices.text: Don't worry about it, go home.
I'll do it, but you owe me.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: You're a lifesaver, Echo! Grab a trash bag out of the shed and use that to grab the leaves, then toss the bag in the trash when you're done. Thanks again!

dialogueLines.Speaker: Reed
dialogueLines.text: I guess that's fair. Let me know what exactly that is next time I see you. You can grab a trash bag out of the shed to bag the leaves, then throw it in the dumpster after. Thanks for helping me.
